hyperedges.label: External Social and Developer Destination Icons

nodes.label: Anonymize First, Analyze Locally, Aggregate Only
nodes.rationale: Open survey answers should yield actionable insight without sending sensitive text to cloud services or revealing individual responses.
nodes.norm_label: anonymize first, analyze locally, aggregate only

nodes.label: Protecting Student Voices - NSE Privacy and Access Model
nodes.norm_label: protecting student voices - nse privacy and access model

nodes.label: Controlled Privacy System
nodes.rationale: The controlled system replaces emailed raw data and untracked external tools with internal processing, de-identification, aggregate-only access, and small-group suppression.

nodes.label: Quality Officer Privacy Preference
nodes.rationale: Quality officers favor removing contextual descriptions and using a conservative ten-student threshold, subject to final confirmation.

nodes.label: Researcher Access to Aggregated Insights Only
nodes.norm_label: researcher access to aggregated insights only

nodes.label: Student Data Hosting Policy
nodes.rationale: Because responses contain sensitive personal data, Fontys infrastructure is preferred; EU cloud requires agreements and approval, while American cloud services are rejected for this project.
